name: Rich Dough-Breadmaker
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure ingredients into the breadmaker in the order given on the recipe.
2. Select "dough" setting.
3. Push the start button.
4. Depending on the brand of machine, this can take from 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
Cinnamon-Raisin Rolls:
1. Roll out dough into a 12x14 inch rectangle.
2. Spread the surface with 1/3 cup butter.
3. Sprinkle the surface with 1/3 cup brown sugar and 1-1/2 teaspoons cinnamon.
4. Then sprinkle 1/2 cup raisins over the dough.
5. Roll up and cut into 12 pieces.
6. Place on a greased baking sheet, 2 inches apart.
7. Cover lightly with a damp towel.
8. Allow to rise until doubled, about 40 minutes.
9. Bake at 375°F for 10-15 minutes.
